clue: Dead end after turn. Deliver timely assistance!
explanation: DEAD's end is D. A turn is a GO. D after GO gives GOD. To deliver is to SEND. A GODSEND is "timely assistance".
hints: We need to find words that mean "turn" and "deliver".
What is the end of DEAD?
Put the end of DEAD after the word for "turn".
Follow that with the word for "deliver".
